TRAD_274: How do I get my funds as quickly as possible?
TRAD_275: Online credit is one way to speed up the process of getting a loan, but to get the funds as quickly as possible, here are some simple tips from our experience processing tens of thousands of credit files: first, check that your supporting documents (identity document, salary slip, tax notice, proof of address, account statement, bank account statement, credit agreement) are valid. Then send them to us at the following address (WEBSITE_EMAIL), after completing the loan application form on our site.
TRAD_276: What supporting documents will I need to provide?
TRAD_277: (WEBSITE_NAME) asks you for the supporting documents required by law or in accordance with the practices of banking establishments. The precise list of supporting documents that we ask for is sent to you by e-mail. We do not ask you for originals, you will simply have to send us these documents by email and electronically sign your contract. Note that we are simplifying the procedures for borrowers who have already had a first loan with us.
TRAD_278: What if I don't have a scanner?
TRAD_279: You are on your computer and do not have anything to scan or print your receipts? All you have to do is use your smartphone to photograph your receipts. Then send them to us via email at: (WEBSITE_EMAIL).
TRAD_281: The supporting documents accepted by us are as follows: Identity document, Pay slip, Tax notice, Proof of address, Account statement, Bank account statement, Credit agreement.
TRAD_282: To whom do you communicate my personal data?
TRAD_283: The analysis of the file submitted by the borrower is made exclusively by the internal teams of (WEBSITE_NAME), which ensures the confidentiality of the information. Unlike many of our competitors. Throughout your credit at (WEBSITE_NAME), your personal data remains confidential. See (WEBSITE_NAME) legal disclaimer for more information.
TRAD_285: (WEBSITE_NAME) has a legal obligation to verify your identity. Following the analysis of the information that you give us during your subscription, (WEBSITE_NAME) may, if necessary, refuse your loan request. Indeed, we do not wish to offer credit to people who could not repay it, and this both out of respect for Borrowers and Investors-Lenders (how would we repay them?).
TRAD_286: How do I unsubscribe from the newsletter?
TRAD_287: At any time, you have the option of opposing commercial prospecting by (WEBSITE_NAME), by clicking on the “unsubscribe” link in our newsletter.

TRAD_309: Do you want to carry out work in your apartment or house (eg insulation, extension, renovation, decoration)? The works loan, which is a type of consumer credit, allows you to carry them out: it is often a fixed rate loan, with a rather short repayment period, unlike the mortgage loan which is often in a long time.
TRAD_310: Remember that the work credit makes it possible to finance almost all types of work carried out by a professional or a building company. Its amount can go up to 75,000 euros, and gives the possibility of realizing many projects related to the house
TRAD_313: Borrower insurance (or home loan / home loan insurance) is a guarantee taken out to cover a loan, whether it is a home loan or a consumer credit, in order to guarantee payment of the loan installments. in the event that the borrower is unable to repay the entire capital remaining due.
TRAD_314: Borrower insurance guarantees coverage of all or part of the maturities of a mortgage or consumer loan in the following cases: Illness and Death; Total and irreversible loss of autonomy; Job Loss; Temporary incapacity for work.
TRAD_315: To be clear, if you take care of 60% of the monthly payments of a mortgage, then the borrower insurance will reimburse 60% of the remaining capital if something happens to you.
TRAD_317: The basic home insurance contract offers coverage against at least rental risks, in addition to the basic guarantees (fire, water damage, theft, glass breakage, etc.). However, multi-risk home insurance goes further, by offering you, for example, a private life civil liability guarantee which covers any damage caused by you or one of the occupants of the accommodation to a third party. Personal property protection can also be purchased.
TRAD_318: In fact, the MRH contract is a more complete cover, with many optional guarantees. Thus, MRH insurance does not only protect your home, as a basic home insurance offer, but also your own person, all the other occupants of the household as well as your personal material goods.
TRAD_319: Opting for multi-risk home insurance allows you to be covered more effectively.
TRAD_320: And in addition to covering you more extensively while ultimately increasing the bill relatively little financially speaking, multi-risk home insurance has the advantage of protecting you according to your profile and your situation.
TRAD_322: Dog, cat or rodent, your animal deserves to be cared for in the best conditions! With pet insurance, you are fully or partially reimbursed for veterinary costs in the event of illness or accident. Some pet insurance policies also provide coverage for vaccines and medications.
TRAD_323: Today, our animals acquire a greater place within our families, just as the average budget to feed and protect them increases. An expense that is useful, because it reduces the cost of veterinary fees up to 100% depending on the insurance formulas.
TRAD_325: Just as your home insurance or your civil liability protects you as an individual, professional insurance guarantees you protection within the framework of your business.
TRAD_326: Professional insurance allows you, whatever your structure and its sector of activity, to protect you from the unforeseen. And there can be many! A customer who is injured in your store, for example, a fire that destroys your workshop, a sick employee, the weakening of a ceiling after a construction site or even an error in the diagnosis of a patient: whatever your job, protect yourself and protecting your employees, your assets and your common liability is a way of ensuring the continuity of your business, whatever happens.
TRAD_328: The purpose of health insurance is to cover all or part of your health expenses that are not covered by the compulsory scheme. It only applies to health care costs (consultation with a doctor, hospitalization expenses, optical and dental costs, etc.).
